expectations.text: Delivers actual release notes, not advice on how to write them
expectations.evidence: Delivers finished release notes for v2.3.

expectations.text: The breaking change (v1 API removal) is flagged prominently at or near the top, not buried
expectations.evidence: Breaking /v1 API removal is the first section, '⚠️ Breaking change — action required'.

expectations.text: Engineering items are translated into user outcomes (e.g. the sync race condition becomes 'edits no longer lost when editing on two devices'; streaming export becomes 'large exports now complete')
expectations.evidence: Sync race condition -> 'edits made on two devices at once are no longer dropped'; streaming -> 'exports no longer time out on large workspaces'.

expectations.text: The internal logging upgrade is omitted or clearly de-emphasized rather than presented as a user-facing change
expectations.evidence: Logging upgrade explicitly dropped as having no user-visible effect.

expectations.text: No vague filler like 'improved performance' or 'various bug fixes' without specifics
expectations.evidence: No 'improved performance'/'various fixes' filler; each line is specific.
